## Foster LLP remain the largest immigration law firm in the Houston area for 2025.
by Foster , on Media Mentions
Foster LLP, a leading immigration law firm, has once again been named the largest in the Houston area for 2025. This recognition, highlighted by the Houston Business Journal, reflects the firm’s sustained excellence in delivering top-tier immigration legal services. The achievement is a testament to the dedication of Foster LLP’s […]
